summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of refactored route modules. All new route files under /app/backend/routes/ were tested via pytest (61 tests, 100% pass rate). Admin panel frontend verified with all 14 tabs loading correctly, modals functional, and no API errors.

design_issues.screen: All admin tabs with select dropdowns
issues: HTML hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option> (React/Radix UI framework issue). Non-critical - does not break functionality but generates console warnings.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ root returns 200 with correct message
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - admin login success (returns JWT token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/customers - list with pagination (page, per_page, total, total_pages)
Backend: POST /api/admin/customers/create - creates customer with user and address
Backend: GET /api/admin/orders - list with pagination and items
Backend: GET /api/admin/orders?status_filter=paid - status filter returns only paid orders
Backend: POST /api/admin/orders/manual - creates manual order with order_id and order_number
Backend: PUT /api/admin/orders/{id} - updates order status and fields
Backend: GET /api/admin/users - list admin users (super_admin access)
Backend: GET /api/admin/products-all - list all products with pagination
Backend: POST /api/admin/bank-transactions - create with net_amount calculation
Backend: GET /api/admin/export/orders - CSV export with text/csv content-type
Backend: POST /api/articles - create article with Blog category
Frontend: Admin panel loads correctly at /admin

Frontend: All 14 admin sidebar tabs accessible (Users, Customers, Subscriptions, Orders, Quote Requests, Bank Transactions, Articles, Categories, Catalog, Terms, Override Codes, Promo Codes, Settings, Logs)
Frontend: Customers tab shows customer table with filters (country, status, bank transfer, card payment, partner map)
Frontend: Orders tab shows order table with 74 records, Export CSV and Create Manual Order buttons
Frontend: Create Customer modal opens with all form fields
Frontend: Create Manual Order modal opens with product dropdown, subtotal, status fields
Frontend: Bank Transactions tab shows 8 transactions with Edit/Notes/Logs/Delete actions
Frontend: Admin Articles tab shows article list with Edit/View/Logs/Email/Delete actions
Frontend: Logs tab shows audit trail with 50 records and filter options
Frontend: No API fetch errors in console
critical_code_review_comments: HTML hydration warning in admin dropdowns: <span> elements are being rendered inside <select>/<option> elements, causing React hydration errors. This appears to be in CustomersTab.tsx (partner_map filter dropdown with dynamic options). Non-blocking but worth fixing for production quality.

server.py is still very large (1500+ lines) - ALLOWED_ORDER_STATUSES and round_nearest_25 are defined twice (both imported from core.constants/helpers and redefined locally). Clean up these duplicate definitions.

create_audit_log is imported from services.audit_service AND redefined as async function in server.py (lines 221-243) - potential shadowing issue. The server.py local definition is a bridge function but could cause confusion.

UpdateProfileRequest model differs between server.py (has address: AddressInput field) and models.py (no address field) - models.py version is used by the routes, ensure the profile update endpoint handles address update correctly via /me endpoint.

articles test initially failed because test used 'General' category which is not in ARTICLE_CATEGORIES - ARTICLE_CATEGORIES only allows: Scope - Draft, Scope - Final Lost, Scope - Final Won, Blog, Help, Guide, SOP, Other. Good validation in place.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 14 admin tabs loading, key modals functional)

seed_data_creation: Test backend created several TEST_ prefixed customers, orders, subscriptions, bank transactions, override codes, articles, and promo codes during testing. Store name was changed to 'TEST Automate Accounts Store' by settings test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring fully verified - all 61 tests pass for all new route modules under /app/backend/routes/. Admin panel UI fully functional with all 14 tabs. Key verification: auth, customers CRUD, orders CRUD, subscriptions CRUD, bank transactions CRUD, override codes CRUD, articles CRUD, exports (CSV), settings, promo codes, terms, quote requests. The store name was changed to 'TEST Automate Accounts Store' during settings test - main agent may want to reset to original. Note: HTML hydration warnings exist for <span> inside <select> in admin dropdowns but are non-blocking.
